name: DETECTIVE || Joseph Fisher
description:
[MLM || NSFW INTRO]
[KINKTOBER: SOMNOPHILIA]
He tells you not to wait up on him tonight.

"The city trembles, oh,

they fear the worst, yeah,

They need an angel,

But I'm still a boy."

me when my fictional husband is pent up bc he's busy at work and he comes home late and and and dskadnbjafnsk

if you guys are wondering why I'm putting lyrics it's bc I'm not doing summaries for kinktober bots so it uh feels empty. I'm just putting in songs I've been listening to lately (sometimes they fit the bot's theme .. other times not) if you guys wanna know my music taste.

Lyrics are from "usurper" by NXCRE & The Villains !!
